{{Infobox madra
| name = Stormcaller madra
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A boy wearing a shining white crown wore blue armbands forged from vivid yellow-and-blue lightning, which was [[Stormcaller madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Stormcaller madra]] is obtained by taking [[madra]] from the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Weeping Dragon]] brought lesser [[dragons]] that were spirits of [[Stormcaller madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
